reforms.description: The Federal Government adopted a tax reduction bill aimed at providing taxpayers with relief from income and wage tax through increases in deductions for children and adjustments to the basic tax-free amount.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The tax cuts are expected to stimulate economic activity by increasing disposable income, thereby encouraging consumption and investment.
reforms.status_evidence: The Federal Government adopted a tax reduction bill.
reforms.importance_rationale: The tax reduction bill represents a significant adjustment in fiscal policy aimed at enhancing economic activity, though it is not a structural overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The Federal Government adopted a tax reduction bill. Taxpayers will be provided with some DM 20 billion relief from income and wage tax through increases in deductions for children.
